title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 02 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 02 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 02 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 02/03/2023
DCE iron ore futures tight by 1.56%. some traders were active to sell, steel mills purchased on demand.Today the overall market transaction atmosphere is acceptable. PBF at Shandong port dealt 913-917 yuan/mt; increased 2-5 yuan/mt over yesterday.
